data.title: Hims & Hers revenue grows 73% as company touts opportunities behind weight loss drugs
data.description: Revenue and subscribers both grew by double digits year over year for Hims & Hers as it parted ways with Wegovy maker Novo Nordisk.

data.title: Net sales rise at e.l.f. Beauty in Q1 as tariff worries linger
data.description: Ecommerce helped e.l.f. Beauty's net sales during the period, which marked the company's 26th consecutive quarter of growth.

data.title: AI investments surge, but agentic adoption falls short
data.description: Just 34% of organizations have started implementing agentic AI—systems capable of acting autonomously to manage tasks or make decisions.

data.title: US Foods pushes further into digital transformation with Q2 sales growth
data.description: Digital adoption continues to be a major growth driver. US Foods said 90% of its customers now use its MOXe ecommerce platform.

data.title: Resideo, ADI see ecommerce boost as Q2 revenue grows 22%
data.description: "Organic ecommerce net revenue grew 19% year over year, achieving another quarter of strong revenue contribution and a new record in run rate daily sales average," the company said.
